subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The world was overcome with heedlessness, and creation was enveloped in encompassing and successive darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان جهان را غفلت مستولی بود و امکان را ظلمت محیط و متوالی و کیهان
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @development of capacity and readiness
